title: DDoS Spike Ratios — Live vs Baseline
description: Tracks overall and hourly spike ratios per source IP. Ratios above the threshold trigger an alert.
viz_content: SELECT _tp_time, src_ip, round(overall_spike_ratio, 2) AS overall_ratio, round(hourly_spike_ratio, 2) AS hourly_ratio FROM [[ .DB ]].cxt_ddos_stream WHERE src_ip = to_ipv4('{{filter_src_ip}}') AND _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}}

title: Live Traffic (5s window)
description: Bytes transferred per source IP in rolling 5-second windows.
viz_content: SELECT _tp_time, src_ip, live_bytes FROM [[ .DB ]].sig_live_5s_traffic WHERE src_ip = to_ipv4('{{filter_src_ip}}') AND _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}}

title: Overall Baseline
viz_content: SELECT src_ip, round(avg_baseline_bytes, 0) AS avg_bytes FROM table([[ .DB ]].sig_overall_baseline_mut) WHERE src_ip = to_ipv4('{{filter_src_ip}}')

title: Hourly Baseline
description: Per-IP per-hour baseline for time-of-day anomaly detection.
viz_content: SELECT src_ip, hour_of_day, round(avg_baseline_bytes, 0) AS avg_bytes FROM table([[ .DB ]].sig_hourly_baseline_mut) WHERE src_ip = to_ipv4('{{filter_src_ip}}') ORDER BY hour_of_day

title: Active DDoS Detections
description: Events where spike ratio exceeds threshold.
viz_content: SELECT _tp_time, src_ip, live_bytes, round(overall_spike_ratio, 2) AS overall_ratio, round(hourly_spike_ratio, 2) AS hourly_ratio FROM [[ .DB ]].cxt_ddos_stream WHERE (overall_spike_ratio > 10 OR hourly_spike_ratio > 10) AND _tp_time > now() - {{filter_time_range}} ORDER BY _tp_time DESC LIMIT 100
